items.title: Titan Q3 Results Preview: Profit seen rising 35% YoY despite margin pressures
items.description: Titan is expected to deliver a strong Q3FY26 performance, supported by robust festive and wedding demand. Brokerages forecast nearly 29% year-on-year revenue growth and about 35% growth in profit after tax. While the jewellery segment remains the key growth driver, elevated gold prices and an unfavourable product mix are likely to exert pressure on margins.

items.title: Yarn maker Trident posts quarterly profit slump as exports soften
items.description: Indian towel and bedsheet maker Trident reported a 44% profit fall in the third quarter due to a U.S. tariff-induced export slowdown. Revenue dropped 6%, with bedsheet sales declining by a third. The company is establishing a domestic subsidiary to boost overseas sales, particularly in the United States, following recent trade deal developments.

items.title: SBI net profit jumps nearly 25% in December quarter
items.description: State Bank of India reported its highest-ever quarterly net profit, surging nearly 25% year-on-year to ₹21,028 crore in the December quarter. This significant growth was boosted by one-time gains from SBI Mutual Fund dividends and foreign exchange benefits, alongside a 9% rise in net interest income.

items.title: BSE Q3 Results: Cons PAT skyrockets 174% YoY to Rs 602 crore, revenue soars 62%
items.description: BSE Q3 Results: BSE reported a 174% jump in its December quarter consolidated net profit at Rs 602 crore compared to Rs 220 crore reported in the year ago period. The profit after tax (PAT) is attributable to the shareholders of the holding company.

items.title: Bajaj Electricals Q3 Results: Co reports loss of Rs 34 crore, revenue slumps 18% at Rs 1,050.9 crore
items.description: Bajaj Electricals Ltd on Monday reported a consolidated net loss of Rs 34.10 crore for the September quarter of FY26 due to contraction in gross margin and impact from new labour codes.
